description.en: List issues for a specific project in a Sentry organization. Supports searching with a query string.
description.de: Issues fur ein bestimmtes Projekt in einer Sentry-Organisation auflisten. Unterstutzt Suche mit einem Suchbegriff.
description.es: List issues for a specific project in a Sentry organization. Supports searching with a query string.
description.fr: List issues for a specific project in a Sentry organization. Supports searching with a query string.
description.ro: List issues for a specific project in a Sentry organization. Supports searching with a query string.
description.it: List issues for a specific project in a Sentry organization. Supports searching with a query string.

vars.AUTH_TOKEN: env:SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN|Get your auth token from https://sentry.io/settings/auth-tokens/

inputs.name: Organization Slug
inputs.bot: The Sentry organization slug. You can find this in your Sentry URL: https://sentry.io/organizations/{org_slug}/

inputs.name: Project Slug
inputs.bot: The Sentry project slug. Use 'List Projects' to find project slugs.

description.en: A search query to filter issues. Optional.
description.es: A search query to filter issues. Optional.
description.fr: A search query to filter issues. Optional.
description.ro: A search query to filter issues. Optional.
description.it: A search query to filter issues. Optional.
